title: BEM-862 wire relay watch
objective:
Insert in tools/gpt-autonomy-relay/relay_watch.py after line containing 'RELAY = ROOT / "tools/gpt-autonomy-relay/relay.py"': 'MAILBOX_POLL = ROOT / "tools/gpt-autonomy-relay/mailbox_poll.py"'
Insert in tools/gpt-autonomy-relay/relay_watch.py after line containing 'print("BEM-GPT-RELAY-WATCH | NO_ACTION")': '   run(f"python3 {MAILBOX_POLL}")'
Replace in tools/gpt-autonomy-relay/relay_watch.py line containing 'ap.add_argument("--interval", type=int, default=10)' with ' ap.add_argument("--interval", type=int, default=60)'
No issue comments.
